name: Meitnerium
appearance: A highly radioactive metal, of which only a few atoms have ever been made.
uses: At present it is only used in research.
naturalAbundance: Fewer than 10 atoms of meitnerium have ever been made, and it will probably never be isolated in observable quantities. It is made by bombarding bismuth with iron atoms.
biologicalRole: Meitnerium has no known biological role.
